text:
was a in the Scout Regiment. He led a team within Hange Zoë's Fourth Squad during the battle of Shiganshina District.

Appearance

Harold was a man of average height with long, brown hair which he kept parted and swept out of his eyes. When not wearing the standard Scout Regiment uniform, he could be seen wearing a long-sleeve shirt with another short-sleeve shirt over it, and long, gray pants.

Personality

Harold appeared to be a very kind man, spending extra Scout Regiment funds to provide meat for his comrades in celebration of their impending expedition. He also seemed to be rather naive, trusting his subordinates in the regiment to be able to control themselves when presented with meat, and trusting Flegel Reeves to keep the news of the mission to reclaim Wall Maria a secret.

Story

Royal Government arc

Harold is seen attending a meeting between Erwin Smith and the other Scout Regiment officers to discuss the recent revelations involving Eren Jaeger's father Grisha. As the meeting concludes and the officers depart, Harold suggests serving red meat to the soldiers, which the others approve.

Harold spends what little funds the Scout Regiment has remaining to buy meat from the Reeves Company for his comrades, in celebration of their impending expedition to retake Wall Maria. The soldiers begin fighting with each other over the meat and Harold, dejected, apologizes to his fellow officers for wasting the Scouts' budget on the meat.

The following day, all soldiers are ready at sunset. Harold and other high-ranking soldiers salute to members of the other branches and head to the Wall. However, they are met with unexpected fanfare from Trost District's citizens, led by Flegel and the Reeves Company. Having intended to keep their departure a secret, Harold apologizes for having informed Flegel of the mission.

Return to Shiganshina arc

After successfully sealing the hole in Wall Maria, the scouts are ambushed by the Beast Titan and its forces. On Erwin's orders, Harold accompanies Squad Levi and Squad Hange to engage the Armored Titan. After managing to seemingly take down the Armored Titan, the soldiers flee the area after noticing a barrel fly over the Walls. When it does not immediately explode, Hange orders the group to go and finish off Reiner. However, as they are returning to the Armored Titan they are caught in the blast from Bertholdt's Titan transformation and killed.

Legacy

War for Paradis arc

When Hange decides to oppose Eren's plan to destroy the world beyond the Walls, Harold is one of the soldiers remembered while Hange tries to convince Jean and Mikasa that their fallen comrades would not support destroying the world.

After Eren Jaeger's defeat, Harold and the fallen Scout Regiment are shown saluting to Levi in his vision one final time to thank him for his long accomplishments over the years before vanishing.
